heading: Forward Logs with a Custom Function
body:
To assign a function to a log forwarder, specify an `action` of
type `function` that includes the name of the log forwarding
function.

```json
{
   "name": "<name>",
   "log_types": [ "<type>", ... ],
   "log_statuses": [ "<status>", ... ],
   "policy": { "type": "<single|batch>" },
   "action": {
      "type": "function",
      "name": "<function name>"
   }
}
```
